title: PRATYAHARA Straw Weaving Flower Plant Pot Wicker Basket Rattan Flowerpot Storage Basket Handmade Woven Planter Basket Easy Install Easy to Use S
features: Features: High-quality material: This flowerpot is made of high-quality Straw weaving, which is soft and easy to bend; strong toughness and strong breathability; the items placed are dry and ventilated, and not prone to mold.

Flower pot maintenance: Do not place it in a humid and dark place. If it is exposed to water, please place it in a ventilated place to dry. Do not expose it to the sun; do not soak it in water for a long time. If it is contaminated with dust, wipe it gently with a damp cloth.
Wide application: Whether it is plants, fruits, vegetables or seedlings, this pot can be used to grow any kind of plants.
Incorporated waterproof layer: Each flower pot has a built-in waterproof layer, which prevent water from leaking everywhere after watering.
Applicable scenarios: The flower pot can be placed flat, which is very suitable for decorating windowsills, desktops, shelves, balconies, living rooms, kitchens, gardens, offices, etc.
description: PRATYAHARA Description: Size: Small : diameter (upper) 15.5 x diameter (lower) 10.5 x height 11 cm Material: Straw colour: As shown Package Contents: 1 x Flower Pot Only the above package content, other products are not included. Note: Light reflection and different displays may cause the color of the item in the picture a little different from the real thing. The measurement allowed error is +/- 1-3cm.
